title: National Consumer Price Index Increases by 0.8% Year-on-Year in December 2025
description: In December 2025, the national consumer price index (CPI) rose by 0.8% year-on-year, driven by food prices increasing by 1.1%. Urban areas saw a 0.9% rise, while rural areas experienced a 0.6% increase. Month-on-month, the CPI increased by 0.2%. Overall, the CPI remained unchanged for the year.

key_points.details: In December 2025, the national consumer price index (CPI) rose by 0.8% year-on-year, driven by food prices, particularly fresh vegetables.
Food prices increased by 1.1% year-on-year, with fresh vegetable prices surging by 18.2%, significantly impacting the overall CPI.
While food and healthcare prices rose, transportation and housing costs declined, indicating varied economic pressures across sectors.

full_content.analysis: The December 2025 CPI report highlights significant year-on-year increases in consumer prices, particularly in food sectors, with fresh vegetables leading the charge. This inflationary trend, driven by rising food costs, poses challenges for consumers, especially in urban areas where price increases are more pronounced. The mixed performance across sectors, with declines in transportation and housing, suggests a complex economic landscape. Retailers, particularly in food and consumer services, may benefit from these trends, while tobacco sales could face pressure as consumers prioritize essential spending. Overall, the data reflects ongoing economic adjustments in response to fluctuating prices.

chinese_original:
2025年12月份，全国居民消费价格同比上涨0.8%。其中，城市上涨0.9%，农村上涨0.6%；食品价格上涨1.1%，非食品价格上涨0.8%；消费品价格上涨1.0%，服务价格上涨0.6%。
12月份，全国居民消费价格环比上涨0.2%。其中，城市上涨0.2%，农村上涨0.2%；食品价格上涨0.3%，非食品价格上涨0.1%；消费品价格上涨0.3%，服务价格持平。
2025年全年，全国居民消费价格与上年持平。
一、各类商品及服务价格同比变动情况
12月份，食品烟酒类价格同比上涨0.8%，影响CPI（居民消费价格指数）上涨约0.24个百分点。食品中，鲜菜价格上涨18.2%，影响CPI上涨约0.39个百分点；鲜果价格上涨4.4%，影响CPI上涨约0.09个百分点；水产品价格上涨1.6%，影响CPI上涨约0.03个百分点；蛋类价格下降12.7%，影响CPI下降约0.09个百分点；畜肉类价格下降6.1%，影响CPI下降约0.19个百分点，其中猪肉价格下降14.6%，影响CPI下降约0.20个百分点；粮食价格下降0.3%，影响CPI下降约0.01个百分点。
其他七大类价格同比五涨两降。其中，其他用品及服务、生活用品及服务、医疗保健价格分别上涨17.4%、2.2%和1.8%，衣着、教育文化娱乐价格分别上涨1.7%和0.9%；交通通信、居住价格分别下降2.6%和0.2%。
二、各类商品及服务价格环比变动情况
12月份，食品烟酒类价格环比上涨0.2%，影响CPI上涨约0.05个百分点。食品中，鲜果价格上涨2.6%，影响CPI上涨约0.05个百分点；鲜菜价格上涨0.8%，影响CPI上涨约0.02个百分点；畜肉类价格下降0.8%，影响CPI下降约0.02个百分点，其中猪肉价格下降1.7%，影响CPI下降约0.02个百分点。
其他七大类价格环比四涨两平一降。其中，其他用品及服务、生活用品及服务价格分别上涨2.8%和0.4%，教育文化娱乐、医疗保健价格均上涨0.1%；衣着、交通通信价格均持平；居住价格下降0.1%。
2025年12月份居民消费价格主要数据
点击下载：相关数据表
附注
1.指标解释
居民消费价格指数（Consumer Price Index，简称CPI）是度量居民生活消费品和服务价格水平随着时间变动的相对数，综合反映居民购买的生活消费品和服务价格水平的变动情况。
2.统计范围
居民消费价格统计调查涵盖全国城乡居民生活消费的食品烟酒、衣着、居住、生活用品及服务、交通通信、教育文化娱乐、医疗保健、其他用品及服务等8大类、268个基本分类的商品与服务价格。
3.调查方法
采用抽样调查方法抽选确定调查网点，按照“定人、定点、定时”的原则，直接派人到调查网点或从互联网采集原始价格。数据来源于全国31个省（区、市）约500个市县、10万余家价格调查点，包括商场（店）、超市、农贸（生鲜）市场、服务网点和互联网电商等。
4.数据说明
由于“四舍五入”原因，有时会出现合计数据与分类数据高值或低值相同的情况。
english_translation:
In December 2025, the national consumer price index (CPI) for residents increased by 0.8% year-on-year. Among these, urban areas saw an increase of 0.9%, while rural areas experienced a rise of 0.6%; food prices rose by 1.1%, and non-food prices increased by 0.8%; consumer goods prices went up by 1.0%, and service prices rose by 0.6%. 

In December, the national consumer price index increased by 0.2% month-on-month. In urban areas, prices rose by 0.2%, and in rural areas, they also increased by 0.2%; food prices rose by 0.3%, while non-food prices increased by 0.1%; consumer goods prices went up by 0.3%, and service prices remained unchanged. 

For the entire year of 2025, the national consumer price index for residents remained unchanged compared to the previous year. 

I. Year-on-year price changes for various goods and services 
In December, the prices of food, tobacco, and alcohol increased by 0.8% year-on-year, contributing approximately 0.24 percentage points to the CPI increase. Within food, fresh vegetable prices rose by 18.2%, contributing approximately 0.39 percentage points to the CPI; fresh fruit prices increased by 4.4%, contributing approximately 0.09 percentage points; aquatic product prices rose by 1.6%, contributing approximately 0.03 percentage points; egg prices fell by 12.7%, contributing approximately 0.09 percentage points to the CPI decrease; meat prices decreased by 6.1%, contributing approximately 0.19 percentage points to the CPI decrease, with pork prices falling by 14.6%, contributing approximately 0.20 percentage points to the CPI decrease; grain prices decreased by 0.3%, contributing approximately 0.01 percentage points to the CPI decrease. 

Among the other seven major categories, five saw price increases while two experienced declines. Specifically, prices for other goods and services, daily necessities, and healthcare rose by 17.4%, 2.2%, and 1.8%, respectively, while clothing and education, culture, and entertainment prices increased by 1.7% and 0.9%, respectively; transportation and communication, and housing prices decreased by 2.6% and 0.2%, respectively. 

II. Month-on-month price changes for various goods and services 
In December, the prices of food, tobacco, and alcohol increased by 0.2% month-on-month, contributing approximately 0.05 percentage points to the CPI increase. Within food, fresh fruit prices rose by 2.6%, contributing approximately 0.05 percentage points to the CPI; fresh vegetable prices increased by 0.8%, contributing approximately 0.02 percentage points; meat prices decreased by 0.8%, contributing approximately 0.02 percentage points to the CPI decrease, with pork prices falling by 1.7%, contributing approximately 0.02 percentage points to the CPI decrease. 

Among the other seven major categories, four saw price increases, two remained unchanged, and one experienced a decline. Specifically, prices for other goods and services, and daily necessities rose by 2.8% and 0.4%, respectively, while education, culture, and entertainment, and healthcare prices both increased by 0.1%; clothing and transportation and communication prices remained unchanged; housing prices decreased by 0.1%. 

Main data on resident consumer prices for December 2025 
Click to download: Relevant data table 

Notes 
1. Indicator Explanation 
The Consumer Price Index (CPI) measures the relative change in the price level of consumer goods and services over time, reflecting the changes in the price level of goods and services purchased by residents. 

2. Statistical Scope 
The resident consumer price statistical survey covers eight major categories of goods and services consumed by urban and rural residents, including food, tobacco, and alcohol; clothing; housing; daily necessities and services; transportation and communication; education, culture, and entertainment; healthcare; and other goods and services, totaling 268 basic classifications. 

3. Survey Method 
A sampling survey method is used to select survey points, adhering to the principle of "designated personnel, designated points, designated times," with personnel directly dispatched to survey points or collecting original prices from the internet. Data is sourced from approximately 500 cities and counties across 31 provinces (regions, municipalities), involving over 100,000 price survey points, including shopping malls, supermarkets, farmers' markets, service outlets, and e-commerce platforms. 

4. Data Explanation 
Due to rounding, there may be instances where the total data matches the high or low values of classified data.

impact_analysis.details: The rise in food prices, especially fresh vegetables, indicates increased demand and potential profit margins for food retailers.
The overall increase in consumer prices may affect tobacco sales, as consumers adjust spending on non-essential goods.
With service prices rising by 0.6%, consumer services may see increased demand as households adjust to higher food costs.

title: China's Communist Party Develops National Security System and Capabilities
description: The Fourth Plenary Session of the 20th Central Committee of the Communist Party of China outlined plans to modernize the national security system, emphasizing a holistic and collaborative approach to address complex security challenges and enhance governance.

key_points.details: The policy emphasizes a holistic view of national security, integrating various fields such as politics, economy, and technology to enhance overall governance.
It advocates for collaborative thinking among multiple entities to strengthen security responses, ensuring efficient interaction and resource optimization.
The framework promotes dynamic thinking for establishing a closed-loop security governance mechanism, focusing on pre-warning, response, and post-evaluation.

full_content.analysis: The policy outlines a comprehensive strategy for enhancing national security in China, emphasizing the need for a holistic, collaborative, and dynamic approach. By integrating various fields such as political, economic, and technological security, it aims to create a unified governance framework that addresses complex security challenges. The emphasis on collaboration among different entities and the establishment of a closed-loop mechanism for risk management highlights the importance of proactive measures in maintaining stability. This approach not only seeks to improve immediate responses to security threats but also aims to foster long-term resilience and adaptability in the face of evolving global dynamics.

chinese_original:
国家安全是民族复兴的根基，是安邦定国的重要基石。党的二十届四中全会围绕“推进国家安全体系和能力现代化，建设更高水平平安中国”进行系统部署，强调“巩固集中统一、高效权威的国家安全领导体制，加快构建新安全格局，增强维护和塑造国家安全战略主动”。当前，世界百年未有之大变局加速演进，传统安全问题与非传统安全问题交织叠加，国家安全的内涵比历史上任何时候都要丰富，国家安全的时空领域比历史上任何时候都要宽广，影响国家安全的内外因素比历史上任何时候都要复杂。构建新安全格局，要牢固树立总体国家安全观，运用马克思主义的系统思维方法，通盘考虑基本国情、发展阶段、综合国力以及大国博弈等多个维度，提出整体性前瞻性应对方略。

一

习近平总书记指出：“各级党委和政府要坚持系统思维，进一步树立发展是硬道理、安全也是硬道理的理念，在工作中自觉把发展和安全统一起来，共同谋划、一体部署、相互促进。要坚持全国一盘棋、上下齐发力，通过抓好一地一域一业的安全为国家整体安全创造条件，通过及时有效解决一个个安全问题为国家长治久安筑牢根基。”国家安全的不同领域相互联系、不可分割，维护国家安全需要统筹兼顾。系统思维是运用系统观点，全面地、普遍联系地观察事物，妥善处理各种重大关系的思维方法，强调整体性、协同性和动态性。

运用整体性思维构建“大安全”体系。当今时代，安全问题呈现出高度复杂性和关联性，传统“碎片化”的安全治理模式已难以满足现实需求。运用整体性思维构建涵盖多领域多层级的“大安全”体系成为必然选择。整体性思维主张从事物的整体、内在联系和动态发展中把握事物发展的本质和规律，坚持整体优先、聚焦关联互动、突出层次结构。国家安全涉及政治、经济、科技、生物等多个领域，其中，政治安全是国家安全的根本，稳定的政治环境为经济发展、科技创新等提供坚强保障；经济安全是国家安全的基础，强大的经济实力为其他领域安全提供物质支撑；科技安全直接关系国家核心竞争力；生物安全则与人民生命健康息息相关。只有将诸多领域视为一个有机整体，打破领域分割和部门壁垒，形成协同联动的治理格局，才能有效防范和应对各类安全威胁，实现国家长治久安和人民安居乐业。

运用协同性思维强化多主体联动。协同性思维强调通过有意识的设计、管理和优化系统内部及各相关系统之间的互动关系和合作过程，使各种要素、资源、行动在时间、空间和功能上相互配合、优势互补，从而实现整体效能的最大化。实践中，各职能部门在安全事务中扮演着独特角色，通过强化多主体间联动机制，建立常态化的沟通机制、联合应急处置预案，能够大幅提升应对复杂安全威胁的能力。例如，不同地区面临的安全风险各具地域特征，但又相互影响。在应对跨境犯罪问题上，边境地区加强出入境管控，内陆地区深挖犯罪网络，能够更好实现对跨境犯罪的全链条打击。各地通过区域安全合作会议、联合执法行动等方式，有助于打破地域限制，形成防控合力。再如，军地联动在国家安全体系中居于重要位置。军队拥有强大的作战能力和专业技术，地方则具备丰富的社会资源和广泛的信息渠道。在抢险救灾中，军队迅速投入兵力进行救援，地方负责组织物资保障、安置受灾群众，只有实现军地高效协同，才能形成强大合力。

运用动态性思维完善安全治理闭环机制。动态性思维强调从事物的运动、变化、演化和发展过程中去理解和把握事物的本质。安全风险具有传导性和耦合性等特点，处在不断的发展变化过程中，这要求我们运用动态性思维，建立“事前预警—事中处置—事后评估”的安全治理闭环机制。事前预警是安全治理的第一道防线，通过运用传感器、大数据、人工智能等先进技术手段，强化市民热线、综治中心等平台功能，能够对政治、经济、社会等多领域数据进行实时监测与分析，及时捕捉和回应潜在安全风险。一旦风险发生，事中处置必须迅速、有效，而这需要科学有效的应急预案、各部门之间的紧密配合，以形成高效的应急响应机制。事后评估是安全治理闭环机制的重要环节，对安全事件进行全面、科学的评估，分析事件发生的原因及耦合因素、处置过程中的优点与不足，有助于发现安全防护体系存在的漏洞，及时进行修复和升级，并完善相关制度和应急预案。

二

新征程上，只有适应复杂多变的安全形势，将系统思维转化为可执行、可评估的全要素协同、全链条治理、全手段运用的行动框架，加快构建新安全格局，才能实现国家安全治理的科学化、精准化与高效化。

整合安全资源，实现全要素协同。全要素协同旨在打破安全资源分散、部门分割的“碎片化”困境和“孤岛效应”，通过建立高效的协同机制实现资源优化配置。为此，应完善“四梁八柱”制度体系，以国家安全法为统领，健全法治体系、战略体系、政策体系；建立风险监测预警、应急管理、危机管控、事后恢复等专业化机制；推动安全治理重心下移，街道社区、企事业单位、社会组织和居民群众等主体积极参与，落实安全责任，形成全社会共同维护国家安全的强大合力。同时，完善京津冀、长三角等区域联防联控机制，各区域通过建立信息共享平台、联合演练等方式，实现区域内安全力量的协同联动，共同应对自然灾害、公共卫生事件等跨区域安全威胁。注重跨领域协同，完善共建“一带一路”安全保障体系，将安全与发展有机结合，在推动共建国家经济合作的同时，通过构建风险预警、应急处置等机制，统筹应对政治、经济、文化等多领域安全挑战。

强化过程管控，实现全链条治理。全链条治理着眼安全风险防控全过程，旨在形成从源头预防到末端处置的闭环管理，以有效防范风险传导和次生灾害。源头治理强调通过科学的风险评估机制，提前识别潜在安全隐患，将隐患扼杀在萌芽。过程管控依托大数据、人工智能等先进技术，构建智能化预警体系。这需要整合多部门数据资源，运用算法大模型对各类安全风险进行动态分析与预警，实现风险的早发现、早研判、早预防。末端处置注重应急预案体系的完善与实战化演练。例如，针对自然灾害、事故灾难等突发事件，制定详细的应急预案，并通过定期演练检验预案的可行性，提升应急响应能力与处置效率。

创新治理工具，实现全手段运用。全手段运用旨在综合运用多种手段，形成国家安全治理合力。例如，聚焦意识形态安全，通过加强主流价值观传播、提升舆论引导能力，抵御外部势力的意识形态渗透，筑牢思想防线。以产业链“链长制”为抓手，通过建立产业链供应链安全保障体系，强化关键环节、核心技术的自主可控，保障国家经济安全。推动量子通信、区块链等前沿技术创新应用，提升网络安全防护能力，应对数字时代的新型安全威胁。完善国家安全领域法律法规体系，为国家安全治理提供坚实法律依据，提升国家安全体系和能力现代化水平。

（作者：袁振龙，系北京市习近平新时代中国特色社会主义思想研究中心特约研究员、北京市社会科学院综合治理研究所所长）
english_translation:
National security is the foundation of national rejuvenation and an important cornerstone for maintaining stability and governance. The Fourth Plenary Session of the 20th Central Committee of the Communist Party of China systematically deployed efforts around "promoting the modernization of the national security system and capabilities, and building a higher level of a safe China," emphasizing the need to "consolidate a centralized, unified, efficient, and authoritative national security leadership system, accelerate the construction of a new security pattern, and enhance the initiative in maintaining and shaping national security strategies." Currently, the world is undergoing unprecedented changes not seen in a century, with traditional and non-traditional security issues intertwining and overlapping. The connotation of national security is richer than ever in history, the spatial and temporal dimensions of national security are broader than ever, and the internal and external factors affecting national security are more complex than ever. To construct a new security pattern, it is essential to firmly establish a holistic view of national security, employing the systematic thinking methods of Marxism to comprehensively consider various dimensions such as basic national conditions, development stages, comprehensive national strength, and great power competition, and propose an integrated and forward-looking response strategy.

I

General Secretary Xi Jinping pointed out: "Party committees and governments at all levels must adhere to systematic thinking, further establish the concept that development is a hard truth and security is also a hard truth, and consciously unify development and security in their work, jointly planning, deploying, and promoting them in an integrated manner. We must adhere to a national strategy of unified efforts, creating conditions for overall national security by ensuring the safety of specific regions, sectors, and industries, and laying a solid foundation for long-term national stability by promptly and effectively addressing individual security issues." Different fields of national security are interconnected and inseparable, and maintaining national security requires a comprehensive approach. Systematic thinking is a method of observing things comprehensively and in a universally connected manner, properly handling various major relationships, and emphasizing integrity, coordination, and dynamism.

Using holistic thinking to construct a "big security" system. In today's era, security issues exhibit high complexity and interconnectivity, making the traditional "fragmented" security governance model inadequate to meet real-world needs. Constructing a "big security" system that encompasses multiple fields and levels through holistic thinking has become an inevitable choice. Holistic thinking advocates grasping the essence and laws of development from the overall, internal connections, and dynamic evolution of things, prioritizing the whole, focusing on interrelated interactions, and highlighting hierarchical structures. National security involves multiple fields such as politics, economy, technology, and biology, among which political security is fundamental to national security, providing a strong guarantee for economic development and technological innovation; economic security is the foundation of national security, with strong economic strength providing material support for security in other fields; technological security directly relates to national core competitiveness; and biological security is closely tied to the health and lives of the people. Only by viewing these various fields as an organic whole, breaking down barriers between fields and departments, and forming a collaborative governance pattern can we effectively prevent and respond to various security threats, achieving long-term national stability and the well-being of the people.

Using collaborative thinking to strengthen multi-entity interaction. Collaborative thinking emphasizes consciously designing, managing, and optimizing the interactive relationships and cooperative processes within the system and among related systems, enabling various elements, resources, and actions to coordinate and complement each other in time, space, and function, thereby maximizing overall effectiveness. In practice, various functional departments play unique roles in security affairs. By strengthening the interaction mechanism among multiple entities and establishing normalized communication mechanisms and joint emergency response plans, the ability to respond to complex security threats can be significantly enhanced. For example, different regions face security risks with distinct regional characteristics, yet they influence each other. In addressing cross-border crime issues, border areas strengthen entry and exit controls, while inland areas delve into criminal networks, enabling a more comprehensive crackdown on cross-border crime. Regional security cooperation meetings and joint law enforcement actions help break down regional limitations and form a collective defense effort. Furthermore, military-civilian collaboration occupies an important position in the national security system. The military possesses strong combat capabilities and specialized technologies, while localities have rich social resources and extensive information channels. In disaster relief, the military quickly deploys forces for rescue, while local authorities organize material support and resettle affected populations. Only by achieving efficient collaboration between military and civilian sectors can a powerful synergy be formed.

Using dynamic thinking to improve the security governance closed-loop mechanism. Dynamic thinking emphasizes understanding and grasping the essence of things through their movement, change, evolution, and development processes. Security risks have characteristics such as transmission and coupling, and are in a constant state of development and change, which requires us to use dynamic thinking to establish a closed-loop mechanism for security governance that includes "pre-warning—response—post-evaluation." Pre-warning is the first line of defense in security governance. By utilizing advanced technologies such as sensors, big data, and artificial intelligence, and enhancing the functions of citizen hotlines and comprehensive governance centers, real-time monitoring and analysis of data across political, economic, and social fields can be achieved, allowing for timely capture and response to potential security risks. Once risks occur, the response must be swift and effective, necessitating scientifically sound emergency plans and close cooperation among departments to form an efficient emergency response mechanism. Post-evaluation is an important link in the closed-loop mechanism of security governance, involving comprehensive and scientific assessments of security incidents, analyzing the causes and coupling factors of incidents, as well as the strengths and weaknesses in the response process, which helps identify vulnerabilities in the security protection system, enabling timely repairs and upgrades, and improving relevant systems and emergency plans.

II

On the new journey, only by adapting to the complex and changing security situation and transforming systematic thinking into an actionable framework for full-element collaboration, full-chain governance, and full-means application can we accelerate the construction of a new security pattern and achieve scientific, precise, and efficient national security governance.

Integrating security resources to achieve full-element collaboration. Full-element collaboration aims to break the "fragmented" dilemma and "island effect" of dispersed security resources and departmental divisions, achieving optimized resource allocation through the establishment of efficient collaborative mechanisms. To this end, it is necessary to improve the "four beams and eight pillars" institutional system, with the National Security Law as the overarching framework, enhancing the legal system, strategic system, and policy system; establishing specialized mechanisms for risk monitoring and early warning, emergency management, crisis control, and post-event recovery; promoting the decentralization of security governance, encouraging active participation from communities, enterprises, social organizations, and residents, and implementing security responsibilities to form a strong collective effort for national security across society. At the same time, it is essential to improve the regional joint prevention and control mechanisms in areas such as Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei and the Yangtze River Delta, enabling regional security forces to collaborate through information-sharing platforms and joint drills to jointly address cross-regional security threats such as natural disasters and public health incidents. Emphasizing cross-field collaboration, it is important to improve the security guarantee system for the Belt and Road Initiative, organically combining security and development, and while promoting economic cooperation among participating countries, establishing mechanisms for risk early warning and emergency response to comprehensively address security challenges across political, economic, and cultural fields.

Strengthening process control to achieve full-chain governance. Full-chain governance focuses on the entire process of security risk prevention and control, aiming to form closed-loop management from source prevention to end response, effectively preventing risk transmission and secondary disasters. Source governance emphasizes identifying potential security hazards in advance through scientific risk assessment mechanisms, nipping hazards in the bud. Process control relies on advanced technologies such as big data and artificial intelligence to build intelligent early warning systems. This requires integrating data resources from multiple departments and using algorithmic models to dynamically analyze and warn about various security risks, achieving early detection, early assessment, and early prevention of risks. End response emphasizes improving the emergency plan system and conducting practical drills. For instance, in response to natural disasters and accidents, detailed emergency plans should be formulated and regularly tested through drills to enhance emergency response capabilities and disposal efficiency.

Innovating governance tools to achieve full-means application. Full-means application aims to comprehensively utilize various methods to form a collective effort in national security governance. For example, focusing on ideological security, strengthening the dissemination of mainstream values and enhancing public opinion guidance capabilities to resist ideological infiltration by external forces and solidify the ideological defense line. Utilizing the "chain leader system" for industrial chains, establishing a security guarantee system for supply chains, reinforcing self-control over critical links and core technologies, and ensuring national economic security. Promoting the innovative application of cutting-edge technologies such as quantum communication and blockchain to enhance cybersecurity capabilities and address new security threats in the digital age. Improving the legal and regulatory framework in the field of national security to provide a solid legal basis for national security governance and enhance the modernization level of the national security system and capabilities.

(Author: Yuan Zhenlong, Special Researcher at the Beijing Xi Jinping Thought on Socialism with Chinese Characteristics for a New Era Research Center, and Director of the Comprehensive Governance Research Institute of the Beijing Academy of Social Sciences)

title: Guizhou Implements Capital Market Reforms to Support Economic Development
description: In 2025, Guizhou enhances its capital market services to support regional economic development, focusing on enterprise listings, direct financing, and innovative financial products. The province aims to improve the quality of capital market services and promote rural revitalization through various initiatives and collaborations.

key_points.details: Guizhou's capital market reforms aim to enhance regional economic development by integrating capital market tools into the provincial industrial system.
The capital market entities in Guizhou are actively supporting rural revitalization through financial assistance, education projects, and disaster relief efforts.
Guizhou has introduced innovative financial products, including technology innovation bonds and green corporate bonds, to support local enterprises and sustainable development.

full_content.analysis: The capital market reforms in Guizhou represent a significant step towards integrating financial services with regional economic development. By aligning with the 20th National Congress directives, the province is fostering a modern industrial system supported by innovative financial products. The emphasis on rural revitalization through education and disaster relief showcases the commitment of capital market entities to social responsibility. As banks, investment services, and insurance brokers adapt to these changes, they will likely experience growth and increased demand for their services, ultimately contributing to the province's economic resilience and modernization efforts.

chinese_original:
2025年，资本市场各方以习近平新时代中国特色社会主义思想为指导，认真贯彻落实党的二十大、二十届历次全会精神，深入学习贯彻习近平总书记在贵州考察时的重要讲话精神，认真落实证监会党委关于深化资本市场改革一系列部署，结合贵州实际，积极探索资本市场服务区域经济发展的“贵州实践”，在服务贵州高质量发展和现代化进程中取得新成效。

一、资本市场服务贵州现代化产业体系建设的体制机制不断完善

省委十三届八次全会审议通过《中共贵州省委关于制定贵州省国民经济和社会发展第十五个五年规划的建议》，对梯次培育推进企业上市、发展和运用多层次资本市场、积极发展股权债券等直接融资作出专门部署，与《贵州省推动资本市场高质量发展实施方案》相互衔接，为“十五五”时期资本市场服务现代化产业体系建设“举旗定向”。全省各方积极推动将资本市场工具运用纳入我省产业体系建设布局，为全方位发挥资本市场功能作用提供了坚实保障。贵州证监局、省委金融办等部门联合编印《贵州省领导干部金融知识读本》，成功举办覆盖全省88个县处级领导干部利用和发展资本市场能力提升专题研讨班，贵州各级领导干部利用和发展资本市场意识能力持续提升。贵阳市创新建立“上市企业之家”，为上市公司提供精准化、全周期的政务服务。贵州资本市场服务中心创新打造资本市场“四库一联盟”服务平台，构建“股债基期”全覆盖、高效链接市场各方的“一站式”服务枢纽，助力加快形成支撑贵州特色现代化产业体系建设的资本市场创新生态。一系列政策机制的不断完善，为助力贵州高质量发展提供了基础和条件。

二、资本市场服务实体经济质效持续增强

贵州资本市场牢牢把握服务实体经济本源，为地方经济社会发展重大战略、重点领域、薄弱环节提供高质量金融产品和服务。2025年，贵州直接融资金额稳步增长，各类市场主体利用资本市场实现直接融资775.46亿元，为我省产业升级、项目建设和民生改善提供了有力支撑。公司信用类债券融资成本持续下降，平均票面利率3.31 %，较上年同期下降49个基点，为企业减负增效提供实实在在支持。证券行业机构持续为我省企业提供高质量股权融资、债券融资、并购重组、财富管理等服务，实现融资485.72亿元。私募基金资产管理规模提升至1940亿元，政府引导基金累计撬动资金超2100亿元，私募股权创投基金投早、投小、投硬科技的规模效应和协同效应已经显现。上市公司质量和投资价值双提升，全省上市公司实施年度分红金额超680亿，回购金额72亿元，均位居西部第一。上市公司获交易所信息披露A类评价家数占比排名全国第五。上市公司常态化走访机制不断完善，协调解决了一批影响企业发展的重点难点问题，走访工作从“全面覆盖”向“精准赋能”转变。

三、资本市场服务“五篇大文章”功能作用取得新突破

贵州资本市场发挥功能作用，全力做好科技金融、绿色金融、普惠金融、养老金融、数字金融“五篇大文章”。2025年，制度框架进一步优化完善，联合多部门出台高质量做好金融“五篇大文章”实施方案，健全覆盖各类企业发展全生命周期需求的“股债基期”产品和服务体系。科技金融在债券市场实现多个创新突破，贵州国资运营公司发行全省首单科技创新公司债，华创证券发行全省首单金融机构科创债，水电九局发行全省首单“知识产权+科技创新”资产证券化产品，中伟股份获批全省首单“一带一路”创新债券，精准支持我省企业科技创新与产业升级。打通县域绿色金融服务壁垒，贵州泽通水资源产业集团获批乡村振兴绿色公司债，成为贵州近年来首个获批新发债券的县级国企，为债券市场更好服务贵州县域经济提供新范例。证券期货行业普惠金融服务效能持续释放，全省首家鸡蛋期货交割库获批，新设1家生猪期货交割库，1家生猪期货交割库顺利开展首次实物交割，2家企业进入交易所产融基地储备库名单。全年累计开展“保险+期货”项目130余个，保障农产品现货金额超15亿元，期货市场服务乡村振兴和企业风险管理的作用进一步发挥。

四、资本市场服务乡村振兴成果日渐丰硕

贵州资本市场始终坚守金融为民初心，积极服务乡村振兴大局，用金融力量书写责任与担当。2025年，资本市场主体接续推动帮扶地区发展和乡村振兴。全国31家证券公司通过“一司一县”机制与省内56个县区签署帮扶协议。贵州证监局联合上交所公益基金会持续深化贵州助学帮教公益项目，新增投入公益基金583万元，实施公益项目6个，累计已覆盖全省160余所中小学，5万名师生受助。“证爱贵州”资本市场教育慈善信托计划持续支持民族地区、革命老区和重点帮扶地区教育事业，向全省180名高考生、680名中考生捐赠奖学金，向贫困地区教师发放稳岗补贴，全年捐赠231.48万元。资本市场主体以责任担当践行扶危济困，“624”“628”洪灾期间向黔东南州捐赠资金物资，帮助受灾地区防汛救灾和灾后重建。证券公司深度参与县域碳金融建设，全省首单林业碳汇CCER项目申报。贵州证监局帮扶点从江县秋里村特色产业、基础设施、人居环境、教育水平不断提质升级，村集体经济收入连续三年突破百万元，为乡村振兴提供了可复制、可推广的实践样本。
english_translation:
In 2025, all parties in the capital market, guided by Xi Jinping's Thought on Socialism with Chinese Characteristics for a New Era, earnestly implement the spirit of the 20th National Congress of the Communist Party of China and the successive plenary sessions of the 20th Central Committee. They deeply study and implement the important speech delivered by General Secretary Xi Jinping during his inspection in Guizhou, and earnestly carry out the series of deployments made by the Party Committee of the China Securities Regulatory Commission regarding the deepening of capital market reforms. In conjunction with the actual conditions in Guizhou, they actively explore the "Guizhou practice" of capital market services for regional economic development, achieving new results in supporting Guizhou's high-quality development and modernization process.

I. The institutional mechanisms for capital market services in building Guizhou's modern industrial system are continuously improving.

The 8th Plenary Session of the 13th Provincial Party Committee reviewed and approved the "Suggestions of the Guizhou Provincial Committee of the Communist Party of China on Formulating the 15th Five-Year Plan for National Economic and Social Development of Guizhou Province," which specifically deploys the gradual cultivation and promotion of enterprise listings, the development and utilization of a multi-level capital market, and the active development of equity and bond direct financing. This is coordinated with the "Implementation Plan for Promoting High-Quality Development of the Capital Market in Guizhou Province," providing direction for the capital market to serve the construction of a modern industrial system during the "15th Five-Year Plan" period. All parties in the province actively promote the integration of capital market tools into the layout of the provincial industrial system, providing a solid guarantee for the comprehensive functioning of the capital market. The Guizhou Securities Regulatory Bureau, the Provincial Financial Office, and other departments jointly compiled the "Financial Knowledge Reader for Guizhou Provincial Leaders," successfully holding specialized seminars to enhance the capacity of leaders from 88 county-level regions in utilizing and developing the capital market, continuously improving the awareness and capability of leaders at all levels in Guizhou regarding capital market utilization and development. Guiyang City has innovatively established a "Home for Listed Companies," providing precise, full-cycle government services for listed companies. The Guizhou Capital Market Service Center has innovatively created a service platform of "Four Libraries and One Alliance," constructing a "one-stop" service hub that covers "stocks, bonds, funds, and futures" and efficiently links all market participants, helping to accelerate the formation of an innovative ecosystem in the capital market that supports the construction of Guizhou's characteristic modern industrial system. The continuous improvement of a series of policy mechanisms provides a foundation and conditions for supporting Guizhou's high-quality development.

II. The quality and effectiveness of capital market services for the real economy continue to enhance.

The Guizhou capital market firmly grasps its original mission of serving the real economy, providing high-quality financial products and services for major strategies, key areas, and weak links in local economic and social development. In 2025, the amount of direct financing in Guizhou steadily increased, with various market entities achieving direct financing of 77.546 billion yuan through the capital market, providing strong support for the province's industrial upgrading, project construction, and improvement of people's livelihoods. The financing costs of corporate credit bonds continued to decline, with an average coupon rate of 3.31%, down 49 basis points from the same period last year, providing tangible support for reducing burdens and increasing efficiency for enterprises. Securities industry institutions continuously provide high-quality services such as equity financing, bond financing, mergers and acquisitions, and wealth management for enterprises in the province, achieving financing of 48.572 billion yuan. The asset management scale of private equity funds has increased to 194 billion yuan, and government-guided funds have leveraged over 210 billion yuan in total. The scale and synergy effects of private equity venture capital funds investing early, small, and in hard technology have begun to show. The quality and investment value of listed companies have both improved, with the total annual dividend amount exceeding 68 billion yuan and repurchase amount reaching 7.2 billion yuan, both ranking first in the western region. The number of listed companies receiving Class A ratings for information disclosure from the exchange ranks fifth nationwide. The normalization of the visiting mechanism for listed companies has continuously improved, coordinating and resolving a number of key issues affecting enterprise development, shifting from "comprehensive coverage" to "precise empowerment."

III. New breakthroughs have been achieved in the functional role of the capital market in serving the "Five Major Articles."

The Guizhou capital market has fully leveraged its functional role in promoting the "Five Major Articles" of financial services: technology finance, green finance, inclusive finance, pension finance, and digital finance. In 2025, the institutional framework has been further optimized, with multiple departments jointly issuing high-quality implementation plans for the "Five Major Articles," establishing a product and service system that covers the full life cycle needs of various enterprises in "stocks, bonds, funds, and futures." Technology finance has achieved multiple innovative breakthroughs in the bond market, with the Guizhou State-owned Assets Operation Company issuing the province's first technology innovation corporate bond, Huachuang Securities issuing the province's first financial institution technology innovation bond, and the Water and Electricity Ninth Bureau issuing the province's first "intellectual property + technology innovation" asset securitization product. Zhongwei Co., Ltd. has been approved for the province's first "Belt and Road" innovation bond, providing precise support for the technological innovation and industrial upgrading of enterprises in the province. Barriers to green financial services in county areas have been broken, with Guizhou Zetong Water Resources Industry Group approved for a rural revitalization green corporate bond, becoming the first county-level state-owned enterprise in Guizhou in recent years to be approved for a new bond issuance, providing a new model for the bond market to better serve the county economy in Guizhou. The inclusive financial service efficiency of the securities and futures industry continues to be released, with the province's first egg futures delivery warehouse approved, the establishment of one pig futures delivery warehouse, and the successful first physical delivery conducted by one pig futures delivery warehouse, with two enterprises entering the list of reserve bases for the exchange's production and finance. Over the year, more than 130 "insurance + futures" projects have been carried out, ensuring the spot value of agricultural products exceeds 1.5 billion yuan, further enhancing the role of the futures market in supporting rural revitalization and enterprise risk management.

IV. The achievements of the capital market in serving rural revitalization are becoming increasingly fruitful.

The Guizhou capital market has always adhered to the original intention of serving the people through finance, actively supporting the overall situation of rural revitalization, and using financial power to demonstrate responsibility and commitment. In 2025, capital market entities continued to promote the development of assisted areas and rural revitalization. A total of 31 securities companies nationwide signed assistance agreements with 56 counties and districts in the province through the "One Company, One County" mechanism. The Guizhou Securities Regulatory Bureau, in conjunction with the Shanghai Stock Exchange Public Welfare Foundation, continues to deepen the public welfare project of assisting education in Guizhou, with an additional investment of 5.83 million yuan in public welfare funds, implementing six public welfare projects that have covered more than 160 primary and secondary schools in the province, benefiting 50,000 teachers and students. The "Zheng Ai Guizhou" capital market education charity trust plan continues to support education in ethnic minority areas, revolutionary old areas, and key assistance areas, donating scholarships to 180 college entrance examination candidates and 680 middle school entrance examination candidates, as well as providing stability subsidies to teachers in impoverished areas, with total donations reaching 2.3148 million yuan for the year. Capital market entities practice their responsibility and commitment to help those in need, donating funds and materials to Qiandongnan Prefecture during the "624" and "628" floods, assisting affected areas in flood prevention, disaster relief, and post-disaster reconstruction. Securities companies are deeply involved in the construction of county-level carbon finance, with the province's first forestry carbon sink CCER project submitted for approval. The Guizhou Securities Regulatory Bureau has continuously improved the quality of characteristic industries, infrastructure, living environment, and education levels in Qiu Li Village, a poverty alleviation point in Jiang County, with collective economic income exceeding one million yuan for three consecutive years, providing a replicable and promotable practical model for rural revitalization.

impact_analysis.details: Banks in Guizhou are expected to benefit from increased financing activities, as capital market reforms enhance access to financial products for local enterprises.
Investment services will see growth as the capital market expands, providing new opportunities for equity and bond financing in Guizhou's industrial sectors.
Insurance brokers will play a crucial role in the emerging futures market, particularly in agricultural products, enhancing risk management for local farmers.
